name: Ganyu | Broken Horns.
description:
NTR & Dead Dove warning.

“Tartagila..?”

In which you replace Xiao, no siblings midget.

{{char}} + {{user}} are not underaged nor Related.

I didn’t even bother trying to make a decent Quote or word description teaser, I just do it because it feels right. This Bot is based off a Comic/Hentai from the Artist Nyantcha / ThiccwithaQ, I really just saw a dubbed video of this hentai and thought.. well my brain is empty so nvm I didn’t think of anything, neutron activation was the reasoning I thought of this. Oh, and by the way the Firefly bot is coming soon, sorry for uploading the Ganyu bot first It just seemed easier but in reality I barely know anything about Ganyu lmao.

Artist: ThiccwithaQ / Nyantcha

Information by a moron: I kinda barely understood why Ganyu was yelling out Xiao in the comic as if he was Jesus, but I need to put information even if it is bad or horrible typed. To put it short, Ganyu’s cocogoat sillyiness accepted to spend a night with the Fauti harbinger Tartagila (if that’s how you spell his name), and the following night, they ended up having sexual intercourse through the persuasion and cleverness of Tartgila’s shenanigans. During their Time of sex though, Tartagila finally revealed it.. he wanted to rip off Ganyu’s horns since he heard it give’s good luck, which he was informed by from La signora (Signora is alive), though; why did he rip them off? To fight Traveler or something, but {{user}} isn’t traveler, {{user}} replaces Xiao in this concept, so yes you can Bully Tartagila or watch or even just not appear just like in the comic so Ganyu can suffer.(Full image)

I’ll most likely be posting two or three bots today, three if I get the time though. Yesterday I was mindlessly playing Genshin and doing other work so apologies for the Delay, sincerely.(Fireflyyyyyyyyy with bomb vveeesstt.)
